active.name: Push Day

blocks.title: Block 1 — Bench press (straight sets)
blocks.note: 3 straight sets — descend weight, chase near-failure each set

exercises.name: Flat or incline DB bench press
exercises.note: Pick flat or incline each session. Push to near-failure on each set.
exercises.tip: Full ROM. Touch chest, lock out at top. Control the descent — 2 seconds down.

blocks.title: Block 2 — Shoulder circuit
blocks.note: 2 rounds — move from one exercise to the next with minimal rest

exercises.name: Seated DB overhead press
exercises.tip: Seated on bench, core braced. Press to full lockout, lower controlled.

exercises.name: DB lateral raise
exercises.tip: Lead with elbows, slight forward lean. Pause briefly at the top.

exercises.name: Plate circles
exercises.tip: Arms extended, draw big slow circles. Keep shoulders packed down.

blocks.title: Block 3 — Push finisher circuit
blocks.note: 2 rounds — higher rep, lower load, finish strong

exercises.name: Push-up variation
exercises.note: Rotate: wide grip / close grip / decline / archer
exercises.tip: Pick a variation that challenges you. Stop 1–2 reps before form breaks.

exercises.name: DB chest fly
exercises.tip: Slight bend in elbows throughout. Feel the stretch at the bottom, squeeze at top.

exercises.name: DB skull crusher
exercises.tip: Upper arms vertical, lower to temples. Slow and controlled.

active.progression: On Block 1, when you can hit the top of each rep range with clean form, bump the starting weight up 5 lbs next session. On circuits, add 1 rep per set before adding weight.

active.name: Pull Day

blocks.title: Block 1 — Row (straight sets)
blocks.note: 3 straight sets — heaviest pulling movement of the day

exercises.name: Single-arm DB row
exercises.tip: Brace on bench. Let the shoulder blade fully protract at the bottom, retract hard at the top. No torso rotation.

exercises.name: DB rear delt fly (prone on bench)
exercises.tip: Face down on incline bench. Lead with elbows, squeeze shoulder blades together at top.

exercises.name: Resistance band pull-apart
exercises.tip: Arms straight, pull to full stretch. Slow controlled return — don't let it snap back.

exercises.name: Resistance band pulldown
exercises.tip: Drive elbows down and back. Squeeze lats at the bottom of each rep.

exercises.name: Incline DB curl
exercises.tip: Arms hanging on incline bench — full bicep stretch at the bottom. No swinging.

exercises.name: DB hammer curl
exercises.tip: Neutral grip. Slow on the way down — 3 seconds. Hits brachialis for arm thickness.

exercises.name: Farmer carry
exercises.tip: Stand tall, shoulders packed back and down. Don't let the weight pull you sideways.

active.progression: On rows, once 3 × 10 per side feels controlled with no momentum, add weight. On carries, increase distance or weight when 40 steps feels easy.

active.name: Squat Day

blocks.title: Block 1 — Goblet squat ladder (straight sets)
blocks.note: 3 straight sets ascending weight — pattern first, then load

exercises.name: Tempo goblet squat
exercises.note: 3 seconds down, 1 second pause at bottom, drive up
exercises.tip: Elbows inside knees at the bottom. Drive through the full foot on the way up. The tempo is the work — don't rush it.

blocks.title: Block 2 — Split squat circuit
blocks.note: 2 rounds — alternate legs within each exercise

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat
exercises.note: Start unweighted, add 15 lb DBs when form is solid
exercises.tip: Rear foot on bench. Front shin stays vertical. Lower slowly — 3 seconds down. This will humble you.

exercises.name: Front foot elevated split squat
exercises.note: Elevate front foot on a plate or step
exercises.tip: Elevation increases range of motion and quad stretch. Keep torso upright.

exercises.name: Side step lunge
exercises.tip: Big lateral step, push hips back as you sink. Keep the stepping foot fully flat on the floor.

exercises.name: Medicine ball lunge
exercises.tip: Hold med ball at chest. Step forward, lower back knee toward floor. Drive through front heel to return.

exercises.name: Curtsy reverse lunge
exercises.tip: Step back and cross behind the standing leg. Targets glute med hard. Keep hips square and torso tall.

exercises.name: Bird-dog
exercises.tip: On all fours. Extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously, hold 2 seconds. Keep hips level — don't rotate.

active.progression: On the goblet squat ladder, add 5 lbs to each set when Set 3 at 50 lbs feels controlled. On Bulgarians, add weight when 8 reps per leg is clean and steady.

active.name: Hinge Day

exercises.name: Single-leg DB RDL
exercises.note: Challenging weight — use DBs in both hands
exercises.tip: Soft bend in standing knee. Hinge until you feel a deep hamstring pull. Don't chase depth with a rounded back — the stretch is the goal, not the range.

exercises.name: DB hip thrust (bench)
exercises.tip: Upper back on bench, DB across hips. Drive through heels. Full glute squeeze and hold 1 second at lockout.

exercises.name: Medicine ball slam
exercises.tip: Full extension overhead, violent exhale on the slam. Hinge to pick it up — don't round your back on the retrieve.

exercises.name: Resistance band hip side step
exercises.note: Band around ankles or just above knees
exercises.tip: Stay in a slight squat throughout. Keep tension in the band — don't let feet come together.

exercises.name: Bird-dog
exercises.tip: Opposite arm and leg, hold 2 seconds at full extension. Hips stay level — imagine a glass of water on your lower back.

exercises.name: Plate circles
exercises.tip: Arms extended at shoulder height. Slow deliberate circles — this is shoulder and core stability work.

exercises.name: Single-leg calf raise
exercises.tip: Full range — don't bounce at the bottom. Use a step edge if available.

active.progression: Single-leg RDL is the anchor movement — once 3 × 8 per leg is controlled and balanced, add weight. On hip thrusts, add load as soon as you can maintain the 1-second lockout hold.
